channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 11.5%.

item.title: ConservativeHome: Helen Whately: Starmer's failure is a stark warning to all politicians who think they can wing it and promise the moon
item.description: Helen Whately: Starmer's failure is a stark warning to all politicians who think they can wing it and promise the moon

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting backs Burnham for return to Westminster, saying he is Labour’s best chance of winning byelection – UK politics live
item.description: Streeting backs Burnham for return to Westminster, saying he is Labour’s best chance of winning byelection – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Trump warns it will be ‘tough’ for Starmer to survive as PM
item.description: Trump warns it will be ‘tough’ for Starmer to survive as PM

item.title: BBC Politics: UK borrowing costs rise and pound falls as leadership drama continues
item.description: UK borrowing costs rise and pound falls as leadership drama continues

item.title: The Guardian: Greens suggest they will properly contest byelection in blow to Burnham - The Guardian
item.description: Greens suggest they will properly contest byelection in blow to Burnham - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): What could happen next in Labour leadership challenge?
item.description: What could happen next in Labour leadership challenge?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Labour leadership race: Key moments in the challenge to take on Keir Starmer
item.description: Labour leadership race: Key moments in the challenge to take on Keir Starmer

item.title: FT UK Politics: Streeting backs Burnham’s by-election run
Independent UK Politics: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM
item.description: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM

item.title: BBC Politics: Analysis: Andy Burnham's route back to Commons is clearer - but can he win in Makerfield?
item.description: Analysis: Andy Burnham's route back to Commons is clearer - but can he win in Makerfield?
